name: github-board-tests
description: Tests for github-board (vanilla JS app). Engine tests need no deps; e2e tests need jsdom.

scripts.test: node test/engine.test.js && node test/extract.test.js && node test/e2e-board.test.js && node test/e2e-splitter.test.js && node test/e2e-splitter-desc.test.js && node test/e2e-multisplit.test.js && node test/e2e-perule-sort.test.js && node test/e2e-share.test.js
